/usr/lib/ccache/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/src/dashboard.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/src/config_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/src/benchmark_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/src/telemetry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/src/inference_panel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/src/storage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/src/process_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/third_party/sqlite3.c.o CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/third_party/implot/implot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/llama_dashboard.dir/third_party/implot/implot_items.cpp.o -o llama_dashboard  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
